memberdef.argsstring: (const float *x, const float *d_out, float *d_x, int tokens, int dim)
memberdef.name: geglu_backward_fp32

detaileddescription.para: dL/dx given dL/d(out) where out = GELU(a) * b Chain rule: dL/da = dL/dout * d(GELU)/da * b dL/db = dL/dout * GELU(a)

memberdef.argsstring: (const uint16_t *x, uint16_t *out, int tokens, int dim, float *scratch)
memberdef.name: geglu_forward_bf16

detaileddescription.para: BF16 version: converts to FP32, computes, converts back. Caller provides scratch buffer of size 3 * tokens * dim * sizeof(float).

Layout:
scratch[0 : 2*tokens*dim] = FP32 input [a, b]
scratch[2*tokens*dim : ...] = FP32 output
Note: We need separate buffers for input and output to avoid overlap when tokens > 1. The input is 2*dim per token, output is dim per token.

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *x, float *out, int tokens, int dim)
memberdef.name: geglu_forward_fp32

detaileddescription.para: Computes out = GELU(a) * b where x = [a, b] along last dimension. Input shape: [tokens, 2 * dim], Output shape: [tokens, dim]

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *input, const float *d_output, float *d_input, size_t n)
memberdef.name: gelu_backward_exact

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *input, const float *d_output, float *d_input, size_t n)
memberdef.name: gelu_backward_fast

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *input, const float *d_output, float *d_input, size_t n)
memberdef.name: gelu_backward_scalar

detaileddescription.para:
GELU activation forward (fast approximation, in-place) Test
test_gelu.py::TestGELUForward::test_gelu_fast_inplace
test_gelu.py::TestGELUForward::test_gelu_vs_exact
test_parity.py::test_gelu_parity
Fast GELU approximation: 0.5 * x * (1 + tanh(sqrt(2/pi) * (x + 0.044715 * x^3))) In-place on contiguous buffer.
After changes: make test && make llamacpp-parity-full

sect1.title: CK-ENGINE KERNEL RULES:

listitem.para: NO malloc/free - memory via bump allocator, pointers passed in
NO OpenMP - parallelization at orchestrator/codegen layer
API must define: inputs, outputs, workspace, and memory layouts
Pure computation - deterministic, no side effects

sect1.para: After changes: make test && make llamacpp-parity-full
GELU: y = x * 0.5 * (1 + erf(x / sqrt(2))) Fast approx: y = x * sigmoid(1.702 * x)
